# Open the Third Door

> Another Way / «Можно иначе» — a live community for people who work with people.
> Most conflicts rest on a false either/or; the lie hides in the framing. We meet
> for live breakdowns and find the third door — the move you couldn't see from
> inside your own point of view — leaving with one concrete step, not inspiration.

The site is a manifesto plus a few pages. Content is Markdown; English is the
canonical source, Russian is a complete translation. Source and contributions:
https://github.com/openthethirddoororg/manifest

## Pages (English, canonical)

- [Manifesto](https://openthethirddoor.org/en): what this is, who it's for, what we value, and the core — leadership of your own life.
- [Values](https://openthethirddoor.org/en/values): the air the community breathes — air, honesty, vulnerability, silence, the third door, action, your own path, dignity.
- [Rules](https://openthethirddoor.org/en/rules): how we work together — the closed breakdown room and the open community.
- [Trust](https://openthethirddoor.org/en/trust): "Why should you trust me? No. You don't." — trust the test, not the person.
- [Join](https://openthethirddoor.org/en/join): who this is (and isn't) for, and how to apply.
- [Co-host](https://openthethirddoor.org/en/cohost): a guide for invited guests who run a meeting.

## Russian translation

- [Манифест](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru), [Ценности](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru/values), [Правила](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru/rules), [Доверие](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru/trust), [Присоединиться](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru/join), [Со-хост](https://openthethirddoor.org/ru/cohost)
